info.name: Microsoft Azure SeaBreezeManagementClient
info.description: APIs to deploy and manage resources to SeaBreeze.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Gets The Logs For The Container

query.description: (Required) The version of the API. This parameter is required and its value must be `2018-07-01-preview`.
Number of lines to show from the end of the logs. Default is 100.

variable.description: (Required) The identity of the service replica.
(Required) The name of the code package.

request.description: Get the logs for the container of a given code package of an application.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The version of the API. This parameter is required and its value must be `2018-07-01-preview`.
Number of lines to show from the end of the logs. Default is 100.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The version of the API. This parameter is required and its value must be `2018-07-01-preview`.
Number of lines to show from the end of the logs. Default is 100.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Gets A Specific Replica Of A Given Service

query.description: (Required) The version of the API. This parameter is required and its value must be `2018-07-01-preview`.

variable.description: (Required) The identity of the service replica.

request.description: Gets the information about the specified replica of a given service of an application. The information includes the runtime properties of the replica instance.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The version of the API. This parameter is required and its value must be `2018-07-01-preview`.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Gets Replicas Of A Given Service

query.description: (Required) The version of the API. This parameter is required and its value must be `2018-07-01-preview`.

request.description: Gets the information about all replicas of a given service of an application. The information includes the runtime properties of the replica instance.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The version of the API. This parameter is required and its value must be `2018-07-01-preview`.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Gets The Properties Of The Service

query.description: (Required) The version of the API. This parameter is required and its value must be `2018-07-01-preview`.

request.description: The operation returns the properties of the service.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The version of the API. This parameter is required and its value must be `2018-07-01-preview`.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Gets Services Of A Given Application

query.description: (Required) The version of the API. This parameter is required and its value must be `2018-07-01-preview`.

request.description: Gets the information about all services of a given service of an application. The information includes the runtime properties of the service instance.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The version of the API. This parameter is required and its value must be `2018-07-01-preview`.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Creates Or Updates An Application Resource

query.description: (Required) The version of the API. This parameter is required and its value must be `2018-07-01-preview`.

request.description:
Creates an application resource with the specified name and description. If an application with the same name already exists, then its description is updated to the one indicated in this request.

Use network resources to provide public connectivity to the services of an application.

response.name: Ok

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The version of the API. This parameter is required and its value must be `2018-07-01-preview`.

response.name: Created

query.description: (Required) The version of the API. This parameter is required and its value must be `2018-07-01-preview`.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Creates Or Updates A Network Resource

query.description: (Required) The version of the API. This parameter is required and its value must be `2018-07-01-preview`.

request.description:
Creates a network resource with the specified name and description. If a network with the same name already exists, then its description is updated to the one indicated in this request.

Use network resources to create private network and configure public connectivity for services within your application.
